infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Quickpost needs camera access to take photos for your social posts
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Quickpost needs photo access to create and share social posts
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Quickpost saves your edited post images to your photo library

plugins.photosPermission: Quickpost needs photo access to create social posts
plugins.cameraPermission: Quickpost needs camera access to take photos for posts

extra.TODO_BEFORE_PRODUCTION: If you change from com.quickpost.app, update both ios.bundleIdentifier and android.package and create identifiers in Apple Developer and Play Console. See RELEASE_BUILD.md.
